message: beads: add viz heat stripe + binning tests

files.patch:
@@ -16,6 +16,10 @@
 {"id":"bd-24q.12.2","title":"Binning Toggle: UI + URL State + Chart Consistency","description":"Wire the binning mode toggle into the UX:
- Toggle near resolution controls; tooltip explains the difference.
- Ensure all charts (timeline, stacked buckets, donut, BOCPD/phase) read the same unified aggregation layer.
- URL state: mode=commit|wall + timezone mode (utc|local).
- Add a small "bin info" chip (bin size, bin count, empty bin count) for transparency.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-08T00:48:02.328884847Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-08T00:48:02.328884847Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["viz"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-24q.12.2","depends_on_id":"bd-24q.12","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-08T00:48:02.328884847Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-24q.12.3","title":"Binning: Unit Tests (Timezone/DST Boundaries)","description":"Unit tests:
- Fixed ISO timestamps around DST transitions; assert correct bin assignment in UTC and in local mode.
- Empty bins: ensure they're present and labeled correctly.
- Aggregation semantics: sums/means/medians match reference calculations for a small dataset.

Diagnostics
- On failure: print timestamps, computed bin keys, and expected vs actual series.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-08T00:48:06.778931537Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-08T00:48:06.778931537Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["viz"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-24q.12.3","depends_on_id":"bd-24q.12","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-08T00:48:06.778931537Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-24q.12.4","title":"Binning: E2E Tests (Toggle + Bin Count Assertions)","description":"E2E scenarios:
- Toggle commit-time -> wall-clock; assert chart x-axis labels change and bin count differs.
- Toggle timezone mode (if exposed): ensure labels update deterministically.
- URL round-trip: share link preserves mode and resolution.

Diagnostics
- Log mode, resolution, bin count, empty bin count, and first/last label.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-08T00:48:11.240114818Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-08T00:48:11.240114818Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["viz"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-24q.12.4","depends_on_id":"bd-24q.12","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-08T00:48:11.240114818Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
+{"id":"bd-24q.13","title":"Viz: Heat Stripe Under Dock (Bucket Density Over Time)","description":"Goal
- Add a compact "heat stripe" under the timeline dock that shows where changes are dense (and which buckets dominate) across the entire history. This makes it easy to spot bursts at a glance and jump there instantly.

UX
- The stripe spans the full width; each pixel/segment maps to a time bin; color encodes dominant bucket and intensity encodes total change mass.
- Hover/tap shows tooltip (time range, commit count, top buckets). Click jumps the main selection to the densest commit in that bin.

Implementation Notes
- Compute per-bin totals + per-bucket contributions; choose a deterministic "dominant bucket" rule with tie-breaking.
- Must stay readable in light mode; use subtle saturation, not neon.

Acceptance Criteria
- Stripe renders quickly; interaction is precise (no off-by-one bin selection).

Testing
- Unit tests for bin->pixel mapping and dominant-bucket selection.
- E2E tests: click stripe segment -> selection changes; tooltip content present.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-08T00:48:22.702479383Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-08T00:48:22.702479383Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["viz"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-24q.13","depends_on_id":"bd-24q","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-08T00:48:22.702479383Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
+{"id":"bd-24q.13.1","title":"Heat Stripe: Compute Density + Dominant Bucket per Bin","description":"Compute stripe data:
- For each bin, compute total change mass (configurable: lines/tokens/lev) and per-bucket contributions.
- Choose dominant bucket with deterministic tie-breaking (highest contribution, then lowest bucket id).
- Provide a mapping from bin -> "representative commit" (e.g., max delta commit) for jump behavior.
- Cache by dataset hash + mode (commit vs wall) + resolution + metric.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-08T00:48:28.163099640Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-08T00:48:28.163099640Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["viz"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-24q.13.1","depends_on_id":"bd-24q.13","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-08T00:48:28.163099640Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
+{"id":"bd-24q.13.2","title":"Heat Stripe: Dock UI Rendering + Tooltip + Click-to-Jump","description":"Render the stripe as a first-class dock element:
- Canvas or SVG implementation; must be crisp on high-DPI.
- Tooltip on hover/tap with time range, commit count, top buckets and intensity.
- Click selects representative commit and updates all panels/charts.
- Mobile: tap + hold shows tooltip; single tap jumps. Avoid accidental jumps while scrubbing.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-08T00:48:32.891360457Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-08T00:48:32.891360457Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["viz"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-24q.13.2","depends_on_id":"bd-24q.13","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-08T00:48:32.891360457Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
+{"id":"bd-24q.13.3","title":"Heat Stripe: Unit Tests (Bin Mapping + Dominance)","description":"Unit tests:
- Bin->pixel mapping: ensure first/last bins map to stripe bounds without gaps.
- Dominant bucket selection: tie-breaking is deterministic; intensity scaling is monotone.
- Representative commit selection per bin is stable.

Diagnostics
- Print bin summaries and selected mapping on failure.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-08T00:48:37.118670284Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-08T00:48:37.118670284Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["viz"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-24q.13.3","depends_on_id":"bd-24q.13","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-08T00:48:37.118670284Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-24q.2","title":"Viz: Heading Mini-Map + Changed-Section Highlighting","description":"Add a left-side (desktop) / slide-over (mobile) heading mini-map generated from the rendered markdown, with per-commit indicators for which headings changed. Clicking a heading scrolls the doc pane; diff view can auto-scroll to first change under that heading.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-08T00:25:28.846093570Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-08T00:25:28.846093570Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["viz"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-24q.2","depends_on_id":"bd-24q","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-08T00:25:28.846093570Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-24q.3","title":"Viz: Shareable Permalinks (URL State) + Copy Link","description":"Encode visualization state in the URL (commit idx, tab, resolution, metric, bucket filters). Add a Copy Link button. Deep links should load without needing any server logic.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-08T00:25:28.919682255Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-08T00:25:28.919682255Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["viz"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-24q.3","depends_on_id":"bd-24q","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-08T00:25:28.919682255Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-24q.4","title":"Viz: Story Mode (Curated Milestones + Autoplay)","description":"Add an optional narrative layer: curated milestones (hand-picked commits) with short annotations and an autoplay scrubber. Desktop: right-side timeline card; Mobile: full-screen swipeable cards.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-08T00:25:28.993920674Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-08T00:25:28.993920674Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["viz"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-24q.4","depends_on_id":"bd-24q","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-08T00:25:28.993920674Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
